design_philosophy: Warm, welcoming, elegant, luxurious, smooth, modern. Emotionally connects with travelers. Combines Nature + Premium Cafe + Modern Shopping + Travel + Hospitality + Kolli Hills. Uses editorial/asymmetric layouts, generous whitespace, cinematic photography of misty hills / fresh coffee / honey / mountain roads. Typography feels curated (serif/display for headings paired with a warm humanist sans-serif for body). Generous spacing, noise/grain texture, and soft Framer Motion interactions.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1E3F20] text-white hover:bg-[#152C16] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: border border-[#1E3F20] text-[#1E3F20] hover:bg-[#1E3F20] hover:text-white transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.accent: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#1F1F1F] hover:bg-[#BFA030] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-medium tracking-wide

cards.category: group relative overflow-hidden bg-[#FAF8F5] border border-[#E8E2D9] transition-all duration-500 hover:shadow-xl
cards.product: bg-white border border-[#E8E2D9] p-4 flex flex-col gap-4 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-lg
cards.review: bg-[#FAF8F5] p-8 border border-[#E8E2D9] flex flex-col gap-4

layout_sections.name: Navigation
layout_sections.description: Sticky glassmorphism header, logo on left, navigation center, CTA right. Dark green text.
layout_sections.classes: fixed w-full top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 border-b border-[#E8E2D9]/50

layout_sections.name: Premium Hero
layout_sections.description: Large cinematic Kolli Hills background, dark gradient overlay to ensure text readability, logo in center or top, headline 'Taste the Freshness of Kolli Hills', subheading, Order Now button, Explore Menu button, smooth scroll indicator at bottom.
layout_sections.classes: relative h-screen flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center px-4

layout_sections.name: Categories
layout_sections.description: Bento grid or elegant flex wrap grid of 15 categories. Cards with hover zoom on images and smooth typography slide up.

layout_sections.name: Best Sellers
layout_sections.description: Grid of 6 top products. Large elegant imagery, rating stars in gold, price, 'Add to Cart' button appearing on hover.

layout_sections.name: Our Story
layout_sections.description: Asymmetric layout. Large cinematic image on one side, long-form warm hospitality copy on the other. Generous line height.

layout_sections.name: Gallery
layout_sections.description: Masonry grid of premium interior shots and real cafe photos provided by user. Hover overlay with brand icon.

layout_sections.name: Customer Reviews
layout_sections.description: Horizontal scrolling or elegant 3-column grid of review cards. Quote icon in gold, minimal typography.

layout_sections.name: Contact & Location
layout_sections.description: Split section: Interactive Map (or static map image with pin) on left, Contact info (Phone, 24 Hours, Pickup Only, Get Directions) on right with dark forest green background.

layout_sections.name: Footer
layout_sections.description: Premium tall footer. Brand logo, quick links, legal, social icons, newsletter signup.

interactions.hover: Subtle scale up (1.05) on images, fade-in for overlays. Use Framer Motion for smooth transitions.
interactions.scroll: Fade in up for sections as they enter viewport.
interactions.micro: Magnetic buttons for primary CTAs, grain texture overlay over the whole app (pointer-events-none, mix-blend-overlay, opacity-5).

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive and key informational elements have a data-testid attribute.
Use Playfair Display for headings and Work Sans for body text. Do not use Inter or Roboto.
Do NOT use standard ecommerce template styling. Layout should be editorial, using generous whitespace.
Apply grain/noise texture overlay app-wide to give it a premium feel.
Ensure the hero background is adequately darkened so the white/gold text is easily readable.
Categories and Best Sellers should use the provided unsplash/pexels images.
Gallery should incorporate the 3 user-provided real photos alongside the unsplash ones.
